name: cfx_getNative
description: Look up a FiveM or RedM native function by exact name, partial name, or hex hash. Returns parameters, return type, description, and examples. The native database is cached in memory for the session. No API key required.

args.query: string - native name, partial name, or hex hash (e.g. GET_ENTITY_COORDS or 0x3FEF770D40960D5A)

name: cfx_queryServer
description: Inspect a live FiveM server's public endpoints. Returns server name, description, player list, resources, and build info from the server's /info.json and /players.json. No API key required. Times out after 5 seconds.

args.host: string - server IP or hostname (e.g. 127.0.0.1 or play.example.com)

name: cfx_searchReleases
description: Search the cfx.re community releases forum via the Discourse search API. Returns matching topic titles, authors, dates, reply counts, and links. No API key required.

args.query: string - search terms (e.g. vehicle spawn menu, esx framework)
args.limit: number (optional, default 10, max 20) - number of results to return
